Mode\u003c/strong\u003e: Always use \u003ccode\u003e'use strict';\u003c/code\u003e at the top of files\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFunction Documentation\u003c/strong\u003e: Use JSDoc comments for all public functions with @param and @returns tags\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eImport Style\u003c/strong\u003e: Use named imports from relative paths with \u003ccode\u003e.js\u003c/code\u003e extension\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eError Handling\u003c/strong\u003e: Always use AxiosError with appropriate error codes\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNull Checks\u003c/strong\u003e: Use explicit checks (\u003ccode\u003e=== null\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e!== undefined\u003c/code\u003e) rather than truthy/falsy checks where precision matters\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eClasses\u003c/strong\u003e: PascalCase (e.g., \u003ccode\u003eAxios\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eAxiosError\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eInterceptorManager\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFunctions\u003c/strong\u003e: camelCase (e.g., \u003ccode\u003ebuildURL\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003emergeConfig\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003edispatchRequest\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eConstants\u003c/strong\u003e: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for error codes (e.g., \u003ccode\u003eERR_NETWORK\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003eETIMEDOUT\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003ePrivate symbols\u003c/strong\u003e: Use Symbol for internal properties (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e$internals\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHelper functions\u003c/strong\u003e: Prefix with underscore for internal helpers (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e_request\u003c/code\u003e)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"// Interceptors execute in a specific order:\n// Request interceptors (last registered -\u0026gt; first registered)\n// Actual request\n// Response interceptors (first registered -\u0026gt; last registered)\n\n// Support both synchronous and asynchronous interceptors\ninterceptors.request.use(onFulfilled, onRejected, {\n  synchronous: false,\n  runWhen: (config) =\u0026gt; config.custom === true,\n});\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e// Interceptors execute in a specific order:\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e// Request interceptors (last registered -\u0026gt; first registered)\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e// Actual request\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e// Response interceptors (first registered -\u0026gt; last registered)\u003c/span\u003e\n\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-c\"\u003e// Support both synchronous and asynchronous interceptors\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003einterceptors\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003erequest\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e(\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eonFulfilled\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003eonRejected\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e{\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003esynchronous\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003efalse\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"pl-en\"\u003erunWhen\u003c/span\u003e: \u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e(\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003econfig\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e)\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e=\u0026gt;\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-s1\"\u003econfig\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e.\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003ecustom\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e===\u003c/span\u003e \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003etrue\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e,\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e}\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan class=\"pl-kos\"\u003e)\u003c/span\u003e\u003cspan dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e use global variables or singletons\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e assume browser or Node.js specific APIs are available\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e mutate configuration objects - always return new objects\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e throw generic Error objects - use AxiosError\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e use \u003ccode\u003e.bind()\u003c/code\u003e without the helper function from \u003ccode\u003elib/helpers/bind.js\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDon't\u003c/strong\u003e add new dependencies without Axios Library - GitHub Copilot Instructions","","## Project Overview","","Axios is a promise-based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. It provides a simple, elegant API for making HTTP requests with features like interceptors, request/response transformation, automatic JSON data handling, and request cancellation.","","## Core Architecture","","### Module Structure","","- **ES6 Modules**: The library uses ES6 import/export syntax throughout","- **Platform Abstraction**: Code is organized to support both browser and Node.js environments via the `platform/` directory","- **Adapter Pattern**: HTTP requests are handled through adapters (XHR, HTTP, Fetch) selected based on the environment","","### Key Components","","#### 1. Core Classes (`lib/core/`)","","- **Axios**: Main class that manages request dispatching and interceptor chains","- **AxiosError**: Custom error class with standardized error codes (ERR_NETWORK, ETIMEDOUT, etc.)","- **AxiosHeaders**: Manages HTTP headers with case-insensitive access and normalization","- **InterceptorManager**: Handles request/response interceptors with synchronous/asynchronous support","","#### 2. Adapters (`lib/adapters/`)","","- **xhr.js**: XMLHttpRequest adapter for browsers","- **http.js**: Node.js HTTP/HTTPS adapter","- **fetch.js**: Fetch API adapter","- Adapters are selected automatically based on environment capabilities","","#### 3. Utilities (`lib/utils.js`)","","- Comprehensive type checking functions (isArray, isObject, isString, etc.)","- Object manipulation utilities (merge, extend, forEach)","- Platform-agnostic helper functions","- Uses functional programming patterns with pure functions","","#### 4. Helpers (`lib/helpers/`)","","- URL building and parameter serialization","- Form data handling and conversion","- Progress event management","- Request/response transformation utilities","","## Coding Conventions","","### Code Style","","1. **Strict Mode**: Always use `'use strict';` at the top of files","2. **Function Documentation**: Use JSDoc comments for all public functions with @param and @returns tags","3. **Import Style**: Use named imports from relative paths with `.js` extension","4. **Error Handling**: Always use AxiosError with appropriate error codes","5. **Null Checks**: Use explicit checks (`=== null`, `!== undefined`) rather than truthy/falsy checks where precision matters","","### Naming Conventions","","- **Classes**: PascalCase (e.g., `Axios`, `AxiosError`, `InterceptorManager`)","- **Functions**: camelCase (e.g., `buildURL`, `mergeConfig`, `dispatchRequest`)","- **Constants**: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for error codes (e.g., `ERR_NETWORK`, `ETIMEDOUT`)","- **Private symbols**: Use Symbol for internal properties (e.g., `$internals`)","- **Helper functions**: Prefix with underscore for internal helpers (e.g., `_request`)","","### Error Handling Patterns","","```javascript","// Always use AxiosError for library errors","throw new AxiosError(message, code, config, request, response);","","// Predefined error codes","AxiosError.ERR_BAD_REQUEST;","AxiosError.ERR_NETWORK;","AxiosError.ETIMEDOUT;","AxiosError.ECONNABORTED;","AxiosError.ERR_CANCELED;","```","","### Configuration Patterns","","- Use `mergeConfig()` to combine configuration objects","- Support both function and object forms for serializers","- Validate options using the `validator` helper","- Apply defaults from `lib/defaults/index.js`","","## Important Design Patterns","","### 1. Interceptor Chain Pattern","","```javascript","// Interceptors execute in a specific order:","// Request interceptors (last registered -\u003e first registered)","// Actual request","// Response interceptors (first registered -\u003e last registered)","","// Support both synchronous and asynchronous interceptors","interceptors.request.use(onFulfilled, onRejected, {","  synchronous: false,","  runWhen: (config) =\u003e config.custom === true,","});","```","","### 2. Adapter Selection","","- Adapters are tried in order: ['xhr', 'http', 'fetch']","- Use capability detection, not environment detection","- Each adapter returns a Promise","","### 3. Request/Response Transformation","","```javascript","// Transformations are applied in arrays","transformRequest: [function(data, headers) {","  // Transform request data","  return data;","}],","transformResponse: [function(data) {","  // Transform response data","  return data;","}]","```","","### 4. Config Merging Strategy","","- Deep merge for nested objects","- Header normalization and flattening","- Method-specific headers override common headers","","## Platform Abstraction","","### Browser vs Node.js","","- **Browser**: Uses XHR or Fetch adapter, includes XSRF protection","- **Node.js**: Uses HTTP/HTTPS adapter, supports streams","- Platform-specific classes in `lib/platform/browser/` and `lib/platform/node/`","","### Environment Detection","","```javascript","// Check feature availability, not environment name","const isXHRAdapterSupported = typeof XMLHttpRequest !== \"undefined\";","```","","## Testing Considerations","","- Functions should be pure and testable in isolation","- Use dependency injection for platform-specific features","- Mock adapters for unit tests","- Support for cancellation should be tested thoroughly","","## Common Pitfalls to Avoid","","1. **Don't** use global variables or singletons","2. **Don't** assume browser or Node.js specific APIs are available","3. **Don't** mutate configuration objects - always return new objects","4. **Don't** throw generic Error objects - use AxiosError","5. **Don't** use `.bind()` without the helper function from `lib/helpers/bind.js`","6. **Don't** add new dependencies without discussion","","## Type Safety Notes","","- The library includes TypeScript definitions (index.d.ts)","- Maintain compatibility with existing type definitions","- Use utils type checking functions consistently (utils.isArray, utils.isString, etc.)","","## Performance Considerations","","- Minimize object allocations in hot paths","- Reuse headers objects when possible","- Use efficient string operations","- Avoid unnecessary array iterations","- Cache compiled regular expressions","","## Request Lifecycle","","1. **Request Creation**: User calls `axios()` or `axios.get/post()` etc.","2. **Config Merging**: Merge instance defaults with request config","3. **Request Interceptors**: Execute in reverse order of registration","4. **Adapter Selection**: Choose appropriate adapter for environment","5. **Request Transformation**: Apply transformRequest functions","6. **HTTP Request**: Adapter performs actual HTTP request","7. **Response Transformation**: Apply transformResponse functions","8. **Response Interceptors**: Execute in order of registration","9. **Promise Resolution**: Return response or throw error","","## Cancellation Patterns","","- Support both CancelToken (legacy) and AbortSignal (modern)","- Always cleanup listeners to prevent memory leaks","- Cancel should work at any stage of the request","","## Common Helper Usage","","### URL Building","","```javascript","import buildURL from \"./helpers/buildURL.js\";","const url = buildURL(baseURL, params, paramsSerializer);","```","","### Header Management","","```javascript","import AxiosHeaders from \"./core/AxiosHeaders.js\";","const headers = AxiosHeaders.from(rawHeaders).normalize();","```","","### Type Checking","","```javascript","import utils from \"./utils.js\";","if (utils.isObject(data) \u0026\u0026 !utils.isStream(data)) {","  // Handle object data","}","```","","## When Adding New Features","","1. Consider both browser and Node.js environments","2. Add appropriate error codes if needed","3. Update TypeScript definitions","4. Maintain backward compatibility","5. Add JSDoc documentation","6. Consider performance implications","7. Test with interceptors and transformations","8. Validate configuration options properly","","## Priority Guidelines","","When suggesting code:","","1. **Compatibility First**: Maintain backward compatibility","2. **Platform Agnostic**: Work in both browser and Node.js","3. **Error Handling**: Use AxiosError consistently","4. **Documentation**: Include JSDoc comments","5. **Performance**: Avoid unnecessary operations","6. **Type Safety**: Use utils type checking consistently","","## Code Examples to Follow","","### Creating a New Helper","","```javascript","\"use strict\";","","import utils from \"../utils.js\";","","/**"," * Brief description of what this helper does"," *"," * @param {Type} paramName - Description"," * @returns {ReturnType} Description"," */","export default function helperName(paramName) {","  // Validate inputs","  if (!utils.isString(paramName)) {","    throw new TypeError(\"paramName must be a string\");","  }","","  // Implementation","  return result;","}","```","","### Creating a New Core Class","","```javascript","\"use strict\";","","import utils from \"../utils.js\";","","/**"," * Class description"," */","class ClassName {","  constructor(config) {","    this.config = config || {};","  }","","  /**","   * Method description","   *","   * @param {Type} param - Description","   * @returns {ReturnType} Description","   */","  methodName(param) {","    // Implementation","  }","}","","export default ClassName;","```","","### Error Handling Pattern","","```javascript","import AxiosError from \"../core/AxiosError.js\";","","// Throw with context","throw new AxiosError(","  \"Descriptive error message\",","  AxiosError.ERR_APPROPRIATE_CODE,","  config,","  request,","  response",");","","// Create from existing error","const axiosError = AxiosError.from(error, code, config, request, response);","```","","## Summary","","When working with Axios code, prioritize compatibility, use the established patterns for error handling and configuration, leverage the utils library for type checking, and ensure code works across both browser and Node.js environments. Always document your code with JSDoc and maintain the functional programming style used throughout the <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Project Overview</h2><a id="user-content-project-overview" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Project Overview" href="#project-overview"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Axios is a promise-based HTTP client for the browser and Node.js. It provides a simple, elegant API for making HTTP requests with features like interceptors, request/response transformation, automatic JSON data handling, and request cancellation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Core Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-core-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Core Architecture" href="#core-architecture"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Module Structure</h3><a id="user-content-module-structure" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Module Structure" href="#module-structure"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>ES6 Modules</strong>: The library uses ES6 import/export syntax throughout</li>
<li><strong>Platform Abstraction</strong>: Code is organized to support both browser and Node.js environments via the <code>platform/</code> directory</li>
<li><strong>Adapter Pattern</strong>: HTTP requests are handled through adapters (XHR, HTTP, Fetch) selected based on the environment</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Key Components</h3><a id="user-content-key-components" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Key Components" href="#key-components"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Core Classes (<code>lib/core/</code>)</h4><a id="user-content-1-core-classes-libcore" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Core Classes (lib/core/)" href="#1-core-classes-libcore"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Axios</strong>: Main class that manages request dispatching and interceptor chains</li>
<li><strong>AxiosError</strong>: Custom error class with standardized error codes (ERR_NETWORK, ETIMEDOUT, etc.)</li>
<li><strong>AxiosHeaders</strong>: Manages HTTP headers with case-insensitive access and normalization</li>
<li><strong>InterceptorManager</strong>: Handles request/response interceptors with synchronous/asynchronous support</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Adapters (<code>lib/adapters/</code>)</h4><a id="user-content-2-adapters-libadapters" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Adapters (lib/adapters/)" href="#2-adapters-libadapters"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>xhr.js</strong>: XMLHttpRequest adapter for browsers</li>
<li><strong>http.js</strong>: Node.js HTTP/HTTPS adapter</li>
<li><strong>fetch.js</strong>: Fetch API adapter</li>
<li>Adapters are selected automatically based on environment capabilities</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Utilities (<code>lib/utils.js</code>)</h4><a id="user-content-3-utilities-libutilsjs" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Utilities (lib/utils.js)" href="#3-utilities-libutilsjs"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Comprehensive type checking functions (isArray, isObject, isString, etc.)</li>
<li>Object manipulation utilities (merge, extend, forEach)</li>
<li>Platform-agnostic helper functions</li>
<li>Uses functional programming patterns with pure functions</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Helpers (<code>lib/helpers/</code>)</h4><a id="user-content-4-helpers-libhelpers" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Helpers (lib/helpers/)" href="#4-helpers-libhelpers"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>URL building and parameter serialization</li>
<li>Form data handling and conversion</li>
<li>Progress event management</li>
<li>Request/response transformation utilities</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Coding Conventions</h2><a id="user-content-coding-conventions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Coding Conventions" href="#coding-conventions"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Code Style</h3><a id="user-content-code-style" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Code Style" href="#code-style"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Strict Mode</strong>: Always use <code>'use strict';</code> at the top of files</li>
<li><strong>Function Documentation</strong>: Use JSDoc comments for all public functions with @param and @returns tags</li>
<li><strong>Import Style</strong>: Use named imports from relative paths with <code>.js</code> extension</li>
<li><strong>Error Handling</strong>: Always use AxiosError with appropriate error codes</li>
<li><strong>Null Checks</strong>: Use explicit checks (<code>=== null</code>, <code>!== undefined</code>) rather than truthy/falsy checks where precision matters</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Naming Conventions</h3><a id="user-content-naming-conventions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Naming Conventions" href="#naming-conventions"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Classes</strong>: PascalCase (e.g., <code>Axios</code>, <code>AxiosError</code>, <code>InterceptorManager</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Functions</strong>: camelCase (e.g., <code>buildURL</code>, <code>mergeConfig</code>, <code>dispatchRequest</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Constants</strong>: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for error codes (e.g., <code>ERR_NETWORK</code>, <code>ETIMEDOUT</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Private symbols</strong>: Use Symbol for internal properties (e.g., <code>$internals</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Helper functions</strong>: Prefix with underscore for internal helpers (e.g., <code>_request</code>)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Error Handling Patterns</h3><a id="user-content-error-handling-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Error Handling Patterns" href="#error-handling-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// Always use AxiosError for library errors
throw new AxiosError(message, code, config, request, response);

// Predefined error codes
AxiosError.ERR_BAD_REQUEST;
AxiosError.ERR_NETWORK;
AxiosError.ETIMEDOUT;
AxiosError.ECONNABORTED;
AxiosError.ERR_CANCELED;"><pre><span class="pl-c">// Always use AxiosError for library errors</span>
<span class="pl-k">throw</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">message</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">code</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">config</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">request</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Predefined error codes</span>
<span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ERR_BAD_REQUEST</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ERR_NETWORK</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ETIMEDOUT</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ECONNABORTED</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ERR_CANCELED</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Configuration Patterns</h3><a id="user-content-configuration-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Configuration Patterns" href="#configuration-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Use <code>mergeConfig()</code> to combine configuration objects</li>
<li>Support both function and object forms for serializers</li>
<li>Validate options using the <code>validator</code> helper</li>
<li>Apply defaults from <code>lib/defaults/index.js</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Important Design Patterns</h2><a id="user-content-important-design-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Important Design Patterns" href="#important-design-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Interceptor Chain Pattern</h3><a id="user-content-1-interceptor-chain-pattern" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Interceptor Chain Pattern" href="#1-interceptor-chain-pattern"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// Interceptors execute in a specific order:
// Request interceptors (last registered -&gt; first registered)
// Actual request
// Response interceptors (first registered -&gt; last registered)

// Support both synchronous and asynchronous interceptors
interceptors.request.use(onFulfilled, onRejected, {
  synchronous: false,
  runWhen: (config) =&gt; config.custom === true,
});"><pre><span class="pl-c">// Interceptors execute in a specific order:</span>
<span class="pl-c">// Request interceptors (last registered -&gt; first registered)</span>
<span class="pl-c">// Actual request</span>
<span class="pl-c">// Response interceptors (first registered -&gt; last registered)</span>

<span class="pl-c">// Support both synchronous and asynchronous interceptors</span>
<span class="pl-s1">interceptors</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">request</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">use</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">onFulfilled</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">onRejected</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">synchronous</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-en">runWhen</span>: <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">config</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=&gt;</span> <span class="pl-s1">config</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">custom</span> <span class="pl-c1">===</span> <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Adapter Selection</h3><a id="user-content-2-adapter-selection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Adapter Selection" href="#2-adapter-selection"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Adapters are tried in order: ['xhr', 'http', 'fetch']</li>
<li>Use capability detection, not environment detection</li>
<li>Each adapter returns a Promise</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Request/Response Transformation</h3><a id="user-content-3-requestresponse-transformation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Request/Response Transformation" href="#3-requestresponse-transformation"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// Transformations are applied in arrays
transformRequest: [function(data, headers) {
  // Transform request data
  return data;
}],
transformResponse: [function(data) {
  // Transform response data
  return data;
}]"><pre><span class="pl-c">// Transformations are applied in arrays</span>
transformRequest: <span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-k">function</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">headers</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c">// Transform request data</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-s1">transformResponse</span>: <span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-k">function</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c">// Transform response data</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">data</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Config Merging Strategy</h3><a id="user-content-4-config-merging-strategy" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Config Merging Strategy" href="#4-config-merging-strategy"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Deep merge for nested objects</li>
<li>Header normalization and flattening</li>
<li>Method-specific headers override common headers</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Platform Abstraction</h2><a id="user-content-platform-abstraction" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Platform Abstraction" href="#platform-abstraction"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Browser vs Node.js</h3><a id="user-content-browser-vs-nodejs" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Browser vs Node.js" href="#browser-vs-nodejs"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Browser</strong>: Uses XHR or Fetch adapter, includes XSRF protection</li>
<li><strong>Node.js</strong>: Uses HTTP/HTTPS adapter, supports streams</li>
<li>Platform-specific classes in <code>lib/platform/browser/</code> and <code>lib/platform/node/</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Environment Detection</h3><a id="user-content-environment-detection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Environment Detection" href="#environment-detection"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// Check feature availability, not environment name
const isXHRAdapterSupported = typeof XMLHttpRequest !== &quot;undefined&quot;;"><pre><span class="pl-c">// Check feature availability, not environment name</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-s1">isXHRAdapterSupported</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">typeof</span> <span class="pl-v">XMLHttpRequest</span> <span class="pl-c1">!==</span> <span class="pl-s">"undefined"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Testing Considerations</h2><a id="user-content-testing-considerations" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Testing Considerations" href="#testing-considerations"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Functions should be pure and testable in isolation</li>
<li>Use dependency injection for platform-specific features</li>
<li>Mock adapters for unit tests</li>
<li>Support for cancellation should be tested thoroughly</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Common Pitfalls to Avoid</h2><a id="user-content-common-pitfalls-to-avoid" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Common Pitfalls to Avoid" href="#common-pitfalls-to-avoid"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Don't</strong> use global variables or singletons</li>
<li><strong>Don't</strong> assume browser or Node.js specific APIs are available</li>
<li><strong>Don't</strong> mutate configuration objects - always return new objects</li>
<li><strong>Don't</strong> throw generic Error objects - use AxiosError</li>
<li><strong>Don't</strong> use <code>.bind()</code> without the helper function from <code>lib/helpers/bind.js</code></li>
<li><strong>Don't</strong> add new dependencies without discussion</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Type Safety Notes</h2><a id="user-content-type-safety-notes" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Type Safety Notes" href="#type-safety-notes"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>The library includes TypeScript definitions (index.d.ts)</li>
<li>Maintain compatibility with existing type definitions</li>
<li>Use utils type checking functions consistently (utils.isArray, utils.isString, etc.)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Performance Considerations</h2><a id="user-content-performance-considerations" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Performance Considerations" href="#performance-considerations"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Minimize object allocations in hot paths</li>
<li>Reuse headers objects when possible</li>
<li>Use efficient string operations</li>
<li>Avoid unnecessary array iterations</li>
<li>Cache compiled regular expressions</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Request Lifecycle</h2><a id="user-content-request-lifecycle" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Request Lifecycle" href="#request-lifecycle"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Request Creation</strong>: User calls <code>axios()</code> or <code>axios.get/post()</code> etc.</li>
<li><strong>Config Merging</strong>: Merge instance defaults with request config</li>
<li><strong>Request Interceptors</strong>: Execute in reverse order of registration</li>
<li><strong>Adapter Selection</strong>: Choose appropriate adapter for environment</li>
<li><strong>Request Transformation</strong>: Apply transformRequest functions</li>
<li><strong>HTTP Request</strong>: Adapter performs actual HTTP request</li>
<li><strong>Response Transformation</strong>: Apply transformResponse functions</li>
<li><strong>Response Interceptors</strong>: Execute in order of registration</li>
<li><strong>Promise Resolution</strong>: Return response or throw error</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Cancellation Patterns</h2><a id="user-content-cancellation-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Cancellation Patterns" href="#cancellation-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Support both CancelToken (legacy) and AbortSignal (modern)</li>
<li>Always cleanup listeners to prevent memory leaks</li>
<li>Cancel should work at any stage of the request</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">When Adding New Features</h2><a id="user-content-when-adding-new-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: When Adding New Features" href="#when-adding-new-features"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Consider both browser and Node.js environments</li>
<li>Add appropriate error codes if needed</li>
<li>Update TypeScript definitions</li>
<li>Maintain backward compatibility</li>
<li>Add JSDoc documentation</li>
<li>Consider performance implications</li>
<li>Test with interceptors and transformations</li>
<li>Validate configuration options properly</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Priority Guidelines</h2><a id="user-content-priority-guidelines" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Priority Guidelines" href="#priority-guidelines"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">When suggesting code:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Compatibility First</strong>: Maintain backward compatibility</li>
<li><strong>Platform Agnostic</strong>: Work in both browser and Node.js</li>
<li><strong>Error Handling</strong>: Use AxiosError consistently</li>
<li><strong>Documentation</strong>: Include JSDoc comments</li>
<li><strong>Performance</strong>: Avoid unnecessary operations</li>
<li><strong>Type Safety</strong>: Use utils type checking consistently</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Code Examples to Follow</h2><a id="user-content-code-examples-to-follow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Code Examples to Follow" href="#code-examples-to-follow"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Creating a New Helper</h3><a id="user-content-creating-a-new-helper" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Creating a New Helper" href="#creating-a-new-helper"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="&quot;use strict&quot;;

import utils from &quot;../utils.js&quot;;

/**
 * Brief description of what this helper does
 *
 * @param {Type} paramName - Description
 * @returns {ReturnType} Description
 */
export default function helperName(paramName) {
  // Validate inputs
  if (!utils.isString(paramName)) {
    throw new TypeError(&quot;paramName must be a string&quot;);
  }

  // Implementation
  return result;
}"><pre><span class="pl-s">"use strict"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">utils</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"../utils.js"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-c">/**</span>
<span class="pl-c"> * Brief description of what this helper does</span>
<span class="pl-c"> *</span>
<span class="pl-c"> * <span class="pl-k">@param</span> {<span class="pl-smi">Type</span>} paramName - Description</span>
<span class="pl-c"> * <span class="pl-k">@returns</span> {<span class="pl-smi">ReturnType</span>} Description</span>
<span class="pl-c"> */</span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-en">helperName</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">paramName</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c">// Validate inputs</span>
  <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">!</span><span class="pl-s1">utils</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">isString</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s1">paramName</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-k">throw</span> <span class="pl-k">new</span> <span class="pl-v">TypeError</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"paramName must be a string"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span>

  <span class="pl-c">// Implementation</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">result</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Creating a New Core Class</h3><a id="user-content-creating-a-new-core-class" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Creating a New Core Class" href="#creating-a-new-core-class"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

}

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Error Handling Pattern</h3><a id="user-content-error-handling-pattern" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Error Handling Pattern" href="#error-handling-pattern"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import AxiosError from &quot;../core/AxiosError.js&quot;;

// Throw with context
throw new AxiosError(
  &quot;Descriptive error message&quot;,
  AxiosError.ERR_APPROPRIATE_CODE,
  config,
  request,
  response
);

// Create from existing error
const axiosError = AxiosError.from(error, code, config, request, response);"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"../core/AxiosError.js"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

  <span class="pl-v">AxiosError</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">ERR_APPROPRIATE_CODE</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>

<p dir="auto">When working with Axios code, prioritize compatibility, use the established patterns for error handling and configuration, leverage the utils library for type checking, and ensure code works across both browser and Node.js environments. Always document your code with JSDoc and maintain the functional programming style used throughout the library.</p>
